strategy: Analyze traditional facial animation bottlenecks: manual keyframing, blend shape sculpting, lip sync alignment
Integrate AI tools at specific workflow stages: expression generation, lip sync, blend shape optimization
Establish hybrid quality gates: AI output validation, manual refinement thresholds, style consistency checks
Create reusable AI prompt templates and parameter presets for consistent character behavior
Implement version control and iteration tracking for AI-assisted vs manual work
summary: Hybrid AI-traditional workflow for facial animation and blend shape creation. Combines AI-driven lip sync and expression generation with manual refinement, maintaining artistic control while leveraging AI efficiency.
